column1: # Source: Cloud Carbon Footprint open dataset (https://www.cloudcarbonfootprint.org)
# Values represent kgCO2e per unit per hour at average utilization.
# kgCO2e_per_vcpu_hour: grid-average carbon intensity × PUE × compute coefficient
# kgCO2e_per_gb_ram_hour: grid-average carbon intensity × PUE × memory coefficient
# Grid intensity sourced from IEA 2023 regional averages.
